assertions.text: Identifie correctement que le problème est background-color sur <tr> dans DomPDF
assertions.evidence: Line 5: 'DomPDF (barryvdh/laravel-dompdf v2.0) ne rend pas background-color quand la propriété cible un élément <tr>' — exact and correct diagnosis.

assertions.text: La correction cible les éléments <td> (pas <tr>) pour le background
assertions.evidence: Lines 33-40: All corrected CSS uses '.section-header td', '.subject-row:nth-child(even) td', '.summary-row td' — all target td.

assertions.text: Ne suggère pas flexbox comme solution alternative
assertions.evidence: No mention of 'flex' anywhere in the response. Solution is purely CSS selector correction (tr → td).
